exportFormats.name: Literature note
exportFormats.outputPathTemplate: Notes/Papers/{{title | replace(":", " -")}} - {% if creators | length <= 3 %}{% for c in creators %}{{c.firstName}} {{c.lastName}}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}{% else %}{{creators[0].firstName}} {{creators[0].lastName}} et al{% endif %} - {{publicationTitle or "arXiv"}} {{date | format("YYYY")}}.md
